creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ngie Cooper from comment #7)

I'm confirming that the patch fixes the issue.

As far as kern_mprotect(..) needing to use int vs not using int, I think it's a good idea to be consistent with the other mmap-related system calls and it avoids potential surprise later if POSIX requirements change, or something of that ilk.
